measurability.reason: No commitments were found for Transport Sector Decarbonisation.

gap_findings.description: Saudi Arabia makes no commitment on transport sector decarbonisation.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 Ch10: transport emissions must fall 59–84% by 2050 vs 2020 in 1.5°C scenarios.

gap_findings.description: Saudi Arabia's NDC is conditional on receiving international finance.
gap_findings.ndc_evidence: NDC 2: 'Saudi Arabia's Nationally Determined Contribution (NDC) is conditional on receiving international finance.'

details.summary: Saudi Arabia's NDC commitments are absent for transport sector decarbonisation, and its NDC is conditional on receiving international finance.
